attributes.title: [Ticura] High-risk indicators (last 24h)
attributes.description: All Ticura indicators with severity >= 70 modified in the last 24 hours, excluding ones that have already aged out. Ranked by severity.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter": [], "query": {"language": "kuery", "query": "_tier:\"data_hot\" and event.module:\"ti_ticura\" and event.severity >= 70 and not threat.indicator.expired:true and @timestamp >= now-24h"}, "indexRefName": "kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}
